title: Sysmon PsExec Named Pipe
description: Detects named pipe creation matching PsExec default pipe names. PsExec creates named pipes for remote command execution and is commonly used for lateral movement.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Pipe Name' like '\PSEXESVC*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\psexec*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\csexec*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\remcom*' or 'Pipe Name' like '\PAExec*')))
